nasb.text: “So it shall be when all of these things have come upon you, the blessing and the curse which I have set before you, and you call them to mind in all nations where the Lord your God has banished you,

esv.text: “And when all these things come upon you, the blessing and the curse, which I have set before you, and you call them to mind among all the nations where the Lord your God has driven you,

cnv.text: “當這一切事，就是我擺在你面前的祝福和咒詛，都臨到你身上的時候，你在耶和華你的　神趕逐你去的萬國中，你心裡必回想這些話，

ccb.text: “当我向你们陈明的这些祝福和咒诅都应验在你们身上时，如果你们在你们的上帝耶和华驱逐你们去的各国中回想这些话，
